news.t: Defiance ETFs Announces Monthly Distributions on $QQQY (105.45%), $JEPY (72.04%), $IWMY (110.96%), $SPYT (20.12%), $USOY (75.17%), and $QQQT (20.06%)
Defiance ETFs Announces Monthly Distributions on $QQQY (52.55%), $JEPY (33.76%), $IWMY (57.99%), $TRES (10.58%), $SPYT (20.00%), $USOY (75.00%), and QQQT (––).
Defiance Launches SPYT, the S&P 500 Income Target ETF. Seeks 20% annual yield.

overview.description: The Defiance S&P 500 Target Income ETF (SPYT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds seeking to provide current income through option premiums from daily S&P 500 call spreads. The secondary objective of the fund is to seek exposure to the indexs performance. SPYT was launched on Mar 7, 2024 and is issued by Defiance.
